content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 MailerLite: Graphic Designer Anywhere in the World California Graphic Design Design Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0076/1823/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.mailerlite.com/company-values">https://www.mailerlite.com/company-values</a> </p> <div class="container"> <div class="lg:px-20 grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6 lg:gap-20 xl:gap-32 items-start"> <div> <div class="text text-xl leading-relaxed space-y-10 lg:mt-2.5"> <p>MailerLite is one of the fastest-growing email marketing services. We help more than 1 million businesses around the world stay in touch with their customers. Today, we are a team of more than 170 dreamers, adventurers, and world travelers passionate about what we do and what we believe in. And we are ready for another talented person to join the party.</p> <p>We're looking for a&nbsp;<strong>Graphic Designer</strong>&nbsp;who can help communicate our brand across different marketing channels, including ads, social media, and our website. This is a marketing-focused design role — partnering closely with our marketing, development, and product teams to create visuals that make an impact.</p> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="container space-y-20"> <div class="lg:px-20"> <h2 class="mb-6 dark:text-white">&nbsp;</h2> <h2 class="mb-6 dark:text-white">Why MailerLite?</h2> <div class="text text-xl mt-4 max-w-screen-lg leading-relaxed dark:text-white/70"> <p>Wondering why we think you’ll love working for MailerLite? Here are our favorite 6 reasons!</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> </div> <div class="lg:px-20 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-x-14 gap-y-16"> <div class="text-black dark:text-white/70"> <ul> <li><strong><span class="h6 mb-1.5 block dark:text-white">You'll be bringing our brand to life</span></strong></li> </ul> <p class="leading-relaxed opacity-60">You'll help define how we show up visually, creating designs that communicate our perspective and strengthen our identity.</p> </div> <div class="text-black dark:text-white/70"> <ul> <li><strong><span class="h6 mb-1.5 block dark:text-white">You'll grow, develop and evolve</span></strong></li> </ul> <p class="leading-relaxed opacity-60">As part of a team that's always looking for new, innovative ways to offer value for our customers, you'll constantly be experimenting, learning, and trying out new things.</p> </div> <div class="text-black dark:text-white/70"> <ul> <li><strong><span class="h6 mb-1.5 block dark:text-white">You'll take ownership</span></strong></li> </ul> <p class="leading-relaxed opacity-60">We expect you to take full responsibility and ownership of your tasks. Team leads avoid micromanaging and minimize interruptions so you can stay focused on your assignments.</p> </div> <div class="text-black dark:text-white/70"> <ul> <li><strong><span class="h6 mb-1.5 block dark:text-white">You'll have experts at hand</span></strong></li> </ul> <p class="leading-relaxed opacity-60">Whenever you’re stuck, your teammates with a wide range of different expertise are ready to help you grow. And they’d love for you to share your knowledge too!</p> </div> <div class="text-black dark:text-white/70"> <ul> <li><strong><span class="h6 mb-1.5 block dark:text-white">You'll pick where you work, every day</span></strong></li> </ul> <p class="leading-relaxed opacity-60">We embrace the remote culture. Every day you get to choose what environment makes you most productive.</p> </div> <div class="text-black dark:text-white/70"> <ul> <li><strong><span class="h6 mb-1.5 block dark:text-white">You'll have stability</span></strong></li> </ul> <p class="leading-relaxed opacity-60">We value a stable workplace! MailerLite has been thriving for over 10 years and our year-over-year growth continues to increase.</p> <p class="leading-relaxed opacity-60">&nbsp;</p> </div> </div> </div> <div class="container"> <div class="lg:px-20"> <div class="max-w-screen-lg"> <h2 class="mb-6">What you will work on</h2> <div class="text text-xl leading-relaxed space-y-5"> <ul> <li> <p>Day-to-day design edits as well as larger creative projects</p> </li> <li> <p>Social media visuals, newsletter graphics, and website/blog imagery</p> </li> <li> <p>Feature pages and localized content for global audiences</p> </li> <li> <p>Broader marketing assets: e-books, presentations, covers, and banners</p> </li> <li> <p>Display advertising creatives across channels</p> </li> <li> <p>Design guidelines and brand consistency materials</p> </li> </ul> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="container"> <div class="lg:px-20"> <div class="max-w-screen-lg"> <h2 class="mb-6">&nbsp;</h2> <h2 class="mb-6">What we expect from you</h2> <div class="text text-xl leading-relaxed space-y-5"> <ul> <li> <p>3-5 years of experience as a graphic designer (portfolio required)</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong working knowledge of color theory, typography, and grid layout</p> </li> <li> <p>Proficient in Figma and Canva; expert-level Adobe Photoshop skills</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience creating banners for display advertising and social media</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfortable working within brand guidelines and design systems</p> </li> <li> <p>Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines</p> </li> <li> <p>Fluent written and verbal English communication skills</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>At least 4 hours overlap required with CET time zone</strong></p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Bonus skills:</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Copywriting skills to complement your visual work</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with HTML and CSS for email or web design</p> </li> <li> <p>Ability to create animations, motion graphics, or short videos</p> </li> <li> <p>Familiarity with CSS frameworks (Tailwind, Bootstrap)</p> </li> <li> <p>A genuine affinity for brand identity and design systems</p> </li> </ul> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="container"> <div class="lg:px-20"> <div class="max-w-screen-lg"> <h2 class="mb-6">&nbsp;</h2> <h2 class="mb-6">What we offer</h2> <div class="text text-xl leading-relaxed space-y-5"> <ul> <li> <p><strong>Yearly gross salary range:</strong>&nbsp;€32,000 - €42,000</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Rem
